name: Arduino Pro Mini 328 3.3V 8Mhz
description: Microcontroller board based on the ATmega328. Suitable for compact Arduino projects.

name: Bluetooth Module HC-05 Master/Slave 6pin
description: HC-05 Bluetooth module for serial wireless communication projects.

description: 20x4 character LCD display with I2C backpack for easy microcontroller connection.

description: Relay module for controlling higher-power devices from a microcontroller.

description: Infrared motion sensor module for automation and security projects.

name: MQ135 Air Quality Sensor Module
description: Gas sensor module for detecting air quality related gases.
specs: Detects NH3, NOx, alcohol, benzene and smoke
